strengths: Strong Power BI and Tableau experience
weaknesses: Limited named social listening platform exposure
improvement_bullets: Spearheaded marketing data initiatives by performing sentiment analysis on customer feedback and social media interactions, directly informing segment-specific campaigns that drove a 300% increase in acquisition.
Conducted real-time monitoring of customer feedback and competitive mentions, utilizing Boolean search logic to synthesize data into actionable reports for executive stakeholders.
Integrated social listening data into Power BI dashboards to track brand reputation trends and consumer behavior, providing the same strategic visibility required for high-profile client accounts.
Analyzed large-scale datasets using Python to uncover emerging social media trends and consumer sentiment, enabling data-driven storytelling that effectively influenced operational strategy.
Applied rigorous data-cleaning processes to extract insights from unstructured text and media monitoring sources, ensuring high-quality, actionable intelligence for cross-functional decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Insights, Data & Intelligence opportunity with Burson. I am interested in this opportunity because of Burson's reputation as a global leader in communications and its innovative use of data-driven storytelling to shape brand strategy. What interests me about working for Burson is its status as an 'academy company' that thrives at the edge of innovation, which inspires me because I am dedicated to continuously evolving my analytical skill set within a collaborative, agency environment. I believe my advanced data modeling and visualization expertise, combined with my experience in strategic marketing analytics, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex, noisy datasets into clear, actionable narratives for stakeholders. In fact, at Shine Masters, I implemented a new data reporting workflow that synthesized diverse metrics and customer sentiment, which directly informed our targeted marketing initiatives. The result was a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months, showcasing my ability to connect technical data to bottom-line business impact. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst role at Burson would allow me to bring my proficiency in Python, SQL, and Power BI to support social listening and campaign measurement for your global client roster. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration and media monitoring skills. I facilitated the transition to automated dashboarding by working closely with operational teams to identify the most critical KPIs, which reduced data processing time by 40% and streamlined our ability to monitor performance in real-time. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data storytelling skills in working on complex brand reputation and consumer behavior initiatives at Burson. I know that my analytical rigor and curiosity regarding digital trends align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
